Incident Report — Sarayan Metals Limited (CIN: U 3 1 9 0 9 K A 2 0 2 1 P L C 0 8 2 3 4 5), listed on Madhura Stock Exchange (MSE), operational cyber incident under PIT Code.
On 04-06-2026 at 19:45 IST, Mr. Dev Mehta (Head-IT) reported unauthorized IMAP access to an employee mailbox; contact dev.mehta@sarayan-metals.in, +91 98190 55432.
Company tax identifiers present in attached logs: PAN AAKCS 1234Q; GSTIN 29AAKCS1234Q1Z9 (noting checksum mismatch), and internal vendor code SM-VND-0042.
The mailbox contained draft Q1 results, a board agenda on a potential buyback/bonus, and investor presentation notes; these qualify as unpublished price sensitive information for Indian listed securities.
Personal data under the DPDPA involved business contact details of employees and vendors; no child (under 18) data was processed or stored in this workflow.
Direct identifiers seen in attachments include a scan with Aadhaar "1234 5678 9012" (test placeholder, not collected as a system of record) and Pa ss port: P1 234567 for a travel booking.
Financial and account references: vendor bank a/c 442211009988 (IFSC FICT0001234), demat client id 1209999999999999 (invalid), and UPI handle meena.rao@fictbank; public helpline 1800-000-0000 appears on a poster.
Named contacts: Ms. Meena Rao, Company Secretary, meena.rao@sarayan-metals.in; role-only references include “CFO” and “Investor Relations” without names.
Containment: tokens were revoked, and filters applied; this is not a MAC address — aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff appears only in documentation screenshots.
Pursuant to the issuer’s PIT policy and MSE listing rules, we informed the Audit Committee and will notify the Securities Oversight Board of Indica via the issuer portal within T+1.
Evidence links: hxxps://mse.listing.example/issuer/SARAYAN?doc=earnings-draft&isUPSI=1&uid=UPSl-0426 and hxxps://mail.sarayan-metals.in/msg/8f2a- 9c1b.
Consent and privacy: consent records for marketing emails are in CRM; Phone: +91-98200 12345; Email: info@sarayan-metals.in; template labels like “PAN: ________” and “Address: ________” in forms are not filled with live data.
Registered office (fictional): Plot 17, Phase II, Nandipur Industrial Area, Kaveri Nagar, Karnataka 560199; support channel: support@sarayan-metals.in; hotline +91-114000 3344.
Negative assurance: no production keys, no Aadhaar databases, and no trade-execution instructions were exposed; next steps: track tickets in jira board ops/sec, patch idp-sso v4.3 and rotate smtp credentials.
